overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown Night City. The player moves along wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements while towering skyscrapers with futuristic architecture dominate the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with towering corporate headquarters and elevated transit bridge

events.description: white van drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the central corporate tower, observing the towering architecture and neon advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with distinctive circular structure at the top and illuminated windows
yellow-orange elevated transit bridge connecting two buildings above the street
large illuminated advertisement with 'GEL' text on the building facade
holographic advertisement with yellow 'T' logo and 'TRITON' text
large white billboard with 'NICOLA' text and portrait advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk intersection dominated by a massive central tower with a circular rooftop structure. The player walks forward on wet asphalt reflecting neon lights from towering glass buildings. An elevated yellow bridge spans overhead between skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements for 'GEL' and 'TRITON'. Sparse vehicle traffic moves through the intersection as light rain creates reflective surfaces on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with holographic advertising facades and parked vehicles

events.description: turns right to walk along the sidewalk, shifting view away from the central tower
passes by parked futuristic vehicles along the curb including a white van and silver sedan

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts, passing a pedestrian with distinctive red hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright red hair and white shirt walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in multiple digital screens with prominent 'FOURTHWALL' signage in blue neon
green neon sign with 'NIGHT CITY' text on the distant building
tall cylindrical structure with shifting colored lights including green, red, and blue segments
line of futuristic vehicles parked along the curb including a white van and silver sports car

segments.scene_description: The player turns right to walk along the sidewalk, leaving the central intersection behind. The 'FOURTHWALL' building dominates the right side with its massive digital advertising screens, while colorful vertical neon pillars and the 'NIGHT CITY' sign illuminate the left. The player passes a pedestrian with red hair and continues past parked futuristic vehicles, with the wet pavement continuing to reflect the vibrant neon lights of the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, towering urban intersection into the dense, neon-saturated corridors of a commercial district. It begins by advancing across wet asphalt toward a massive central tower with a circular rooftop, passing beneath an elevated yellow bridge and holographic advertisements for GEL and TRITON. As the camera moves forward through the light rain, the perspective shifts right to leave the open intersection behind and transition onto a crowded sidewalk. The scene then narrows as the player passes a red-haired pedestrian and parked futuristic vehicles, with the environment shifting from the scale of skyscrapers to the vibrant glow of the FOURTHWALL building and vertical neon pillars. Finally, the movement continues past the illuminated NIGHT CITY sign, with the wet pavement consistently mirroring the shifting colors of the surrounding digital displays.
